entry.title: there is no female gays
entry.content:
In the age of “looksmaxxing” and the so-called “performative male,” there is a tendency to fulfill a parallel—the invention of a female gaze that men can cater to. Maybe, signaling that I’m in the know, I should pretend to read Anton Jäger’s “hyperpolitics” at the local café unsheathed from my tastefully logo-free tote with an alt-milk matcha latte, after some casual bone-smashing, of course. The conception of the “female gaze” is not unexpected as the future shifts to “traditionally feminine” modes of power rather than those “traditionally masculine.” Beyond the redistributive efforts towards equality, being wildly unequally distributed geographically, the societal means of control (in provencial milieux) has shifted away from overt violence, discipline and punishment, towards more subtle and terrifying forces of control, tested in current zones of wanton violence. (I’m sure they’re deeply offended by being bombed into the ground by a rainbow corp. oppressed gay girlboss—“the hypocrisy!” screamed from inside a ball of fire and rubble.) To elaborate these new means of control clearly, we must investigate the notion of gaze.

The “male gaze” arises, first and foremost, from an image of Nature, the visage of an incarnation of power or physical domination and violence: The societal (tribal, familial, etc.) order (of so-called “Nuture”) being informed by sexual dimorphism, and thus the monopolization of violence by the more powerful, upholds the social law. We can say social law is of “Nature” or at least it is Nature’s image as natural law. Socio-political law was made in the image of natural law, the law of the jungle that the weak are ravaged mercilously for resources, is the means of enforcement—legislative, judicial, and executive by force of physical strength and will (the whim of a law imagined, the whim of a sentencing as innocent or guilty, and the whim of execution.) The means by which the Law is upheld need not imply non-consent or consent—in time, the “nuturing” of certain behaviors by threat of violence becomes second nature, becoming natural or one’s nature conforming to natural law. This phenomenon appears in various guises: “learned helplessness,” “manufactured consent,” amongst other names. With consistent stimulation, the threat of external violence need not appear as an anomalous event, but becomes part of the environment that may fundamentally change one’s “Nature.” We can imagine, since the spark of life, the mixture of Nature and Nuture always being so convoluted—there is no clear distinction between them.

The blush of a forest primate’s ass has moved upward to the blush applied as makeup to the buccal flesh—we can imagine the first primates to leave the hunched over position of the forests, between swinging from branch to branch and being on all fours below the canopy, as teaching the tribe to stand erect on two feet for evolutionary reasons or not, leading to a shift in intensity between the two pairs of blushed cheeks—the necessary signs of copulation. For increased potential progeny and propagation, the intensity of blood must rush away from the rear towards the face, as all primates are now standing face to face: Nuture leading to a change in Nature. By the preparatory actions of gaze in general, the primates’s gaze shifts upward from the rear to the face (rather than rear in the face that blushed the lower cheeks,) all become a partie to a mutual becoming that dissolves identities as the fictions they always already were—their nature entirely contingent on accidental nuture and their nuture contingent on accidental nature.

We can therefore dismiss the idea of distinct identities interacting or entering a relationship called “gaze”, because there is no identity outside of the illusion during small epochs, and instead speak of a subject and object of the gaze, which holds more generally. Since there is no given identity by Nature or Nuture, the whole procedure must be reversed, gaze is a relation that defines subjectivity, an encounter that defines those present, initiates into certain milieux, the preparatory rites to become a subject and object. A child subjected to the gaze of a parental order is not objectified by a parental gaze, but becomes a subject in a parental order by being subjected to said order, necessarily upheld by an overwhelming difference in power (and ultimately the threat of violence.) The parental gaze thus defines an object elsewhere—the child displaced into the future, manifold virtual forms of the child which are present in their very absence to move the agents of the parental order (the parents) into action. This image of the child is the back-reaction of a parental gaze by which the parents are themselves seen as objects of the gaze and thus are themselves objectified. The parents must live up to the ends inflicted by the relation of the gaze, as they are only a means to the end of the relation called gaze, in the same way one says an “objectified” woman is only a means to an end. (She is not an object, but a means to an end towards the object of desire, i.e. the end of desire appears to be achievable through the “objectified” woman.) In time, the child can similarly become an object of the gaze, but only through chasing the parents’s desires (which is utterly impossible—the manifold, incoherent virtual form of the child in the future, is ill-defined and subject to endless contingencies.) In time, the child becomes subject to new milieux by countless initiations: a school, a playground, a club, a society, etc., endlessly being gazed upon and learning to gaze; at classmates, passersby, lovers, strangers.

So what can be said of a “female gaze?” Where are the hierophants and where are the trans black queens? Where are the matrilineal lines of succession? It is a question of domain or dominion—parents are bestowed limited domain by the greater laws of a society, of which they have been initiated and are subjected to as its subjects. If one grants limited domains as constituting a gaze, then in the “micro-politics” of power there are endless scenes of “female gaze.” But the traditional argument is to emphasize the “male gaze” as uniquely systemic and widespread, a liquid medium of power that becomes distributed to materially disadvantage and terrorize the gazed upon, with prejudice. Similar expositions are given intersectionally (e.g. regarding race, gender, ability, etc.). It is a particular subjectivity that is experienced, defined by the gaze of men “in general,” internalized and concretized in expressions and behaviors, as if watched by an invisible voyeur. However, outside of any excess enjoyment from the prospect, the gaze relies on an impossible coherence and consistency, absolutely unfounded. The terror of experience means nothing to theory or logic, that must go all the way to the end with or without you or me.

The constitutive fantasy of the gaze is the coherence of the external order—even threatened by violence, all such orders are necessarily contingent, have their genesis in endless slips, mistakes, accidents, and sutured wounds. These moments of genesis, everything fundamentally generated by error in coming to the present moment, determine all orders as haphazard, incoherent, always able to be degenerated by uncoded contingencies (a sickness on to death.) There is no “male gaze” that one can conform expressions and behavior to, to appeal or rage against, just as men “looksmaxxing” must conjure some coherent order or hierarchy behind any potential “female gaze.” For each subject of the gaze one may fantasize the desires of another, just as the child striving to become an object like its parents, or some big group of Others (“men” or “women” “in general” or some specific milieux.) But no matter the apparent coherence and static character, the underlying order is ultimately contingent, arbitrary, mercurially generating empty rules that come and go. (Next week my “alt-milk” can’t be oat-milk, but must be whole milk. In ten years they like weak “jaw-lines”.) Outside of this mercurial element, to suppose one knows the general desire of a group of Others is perversion—the rapist may have convinced themselves all women conform to the image of those that have rape-fantasies, just as a woman (teachers usually, in the news, anyways) may have convinced themselves they know their male child students desire illicit relations—they all appear as the exhibitionist, assuming the desire by projection, assuming they know the desire of the other—forcing the gaze. The exhibitionist becomes a subject of the gaze of another, forces the relation of the gaze through the short-circuit between the “structural” gaze and “physical” vision. There’s a tortuous or Sadistic element by the exhibitionist, of utterly butchering the object of the gaze (butchering the witnessing victim) by forcing them into the role of the desiring or objectified, forcing them into an image of themselves, assuming their desire can be found in exposition.

So it is the case that the “patriarchy” cannot be a coherent order since it relies on the fiction of a competent man (woah, so perfomatively woke!) There is no master, as comforting as the notion is. The current order may appear as an equilibrium, a fixed status quo, but, even in accepting the reality and importance appearance plays, the danger of conjuring such a coherent image is to imagine the current order as necessary and to identify with the subjectivity generated by the order, the “male gaze” implying a certain subjectivity. To make one’s identity out of subjectivity is to believe or be moved by the notion that one’s subjectivity is one’s nature, is of Nature, and thus necessary or essential. The subjectivity of a feminist requires the male gaze and the patriarchal order behind it, and so one must be ready to become non-feminist, with a loss in subjectivity defined by the “male gaze.” As, to identify with a problem means to never solve it.

The female (or so-called “minority” position, in general) cannot be identified with its subordinate position in a contingent and temporary order—progressives must become hyper-woke, so “woke” to dismiss the identification and identity of “wokeness,” so as to never identify with the struggle of a certain subjectivity (being subjected to such and such a gaze.) “Woke” or the current “progressive” status is insufficient, too bogged down in ineffectual nonsense—the future is hyper-woke. Similarly, “hyper-politics” should be a position which abolishes politics in general by an intensification of the political (though we only performatively read him, with a alt-milk matcha, in the fantasy of the “alt-female gaze,” to find an alt open-minded degenerate that we can endlessly perform with.)
entry.summary: In the age of “looksmaxxing” and the so-called “performative male,” there is a tendency to fulfill a parallel—the invention of a female gaze that men can cater to. Maybe, signaling that I’m in the know, I should pretend to read Anton Jäger’s “hyperpolitics” at the local café unsheathed from my tastefully logo-free tote with an alt-milk matcha latte, after some casual bone-smashing, of course. The conception of the “female gaze” is not unexpected as the future shifts to “traditionally feminine” modes of power rather than those “traditionally masculine.” Beyond the redistributive efforts towards equality, being wildly unequally distributed geographically, the societal means of control (in provencial milieux) has shifted away from overt violence, discipline and punishment, towards more subtle and terrifying forces of control, tested in current zones of wanton violence. (I’m sure they’re deeply offended by being bombed into the ground by a rainbow corp. oppressed gay girlboss—“the hypocrisy!” screamed from inside a ball of fire and rubble.) To elaborate these new means of control clearly, we must investigate the notion of gaze.

entry.title: provençiality and death
entry.content:
It is customary for those that occupy provençial milieux to minimize the ubiquity of death, to swiftly relieve and liquidate DEATH as some foreign element (excrement). Of course, we may recourse to Zizek’s arguments regarding European toilets, but it is sufficient to notice the intensity of importance paid to births and funerals—rather mundane physical processes, from an unbothered inhuman or angelic view (in the sense that the heavens should apparently be rather unmoved by present world ‘miracles’ and ‘atrocities’ to not intervene), are elevated to some yet still, by supposed “rational beings,” strange mystical and ritualistic significance. The absence of myths is precisely the myth of the modern provençial subject, largely determined by social scripts, unable to express their lack of autonomy or their unfreedom by the illusion that they are exempt from the primal mythological impulse that generates mythos (narrativization) in the first place.

The direct experience of death was had by humanity at large since time immemorial—not only does one reap grains with the scythe, becoming the image of death (the “grim reaper”) to arrive by empathy with the lively upward movement of plants starting in the agrarian age, but was had in previously ages as well: Soon after the hunt, one finds that to slit the throat an of an animal and drain its blood is the most efficient means of consumption. The empathy with the sacrificed animal became self-deception—to be constituted by death everywhere, rather shamefully tearing into animal and vegetal bodies, meant that we are constituted exactly by what contradicted our own self-conception or ‘identity’—our own death must be identified with that of the lively and animate, or ensouled beings, just as their death is identified with our life.

… to read the rest of this—you can’t because you mustn’t :) most likely you’re too heavy, too serious & mendacious, not light(-hearted) enough, façile and equivocal. regardless, no patreon set up yet.
entry.summary: It is customary for those that occupy provençial milieux to minimize the ubiquity of death, to swiftly relieve and liquidate DEATH as some foreign element (excrement). Of course, we may recourse to Zizek’s arguments regarding European toilets, but it is sufficient to notice the intensity of importance paid to births and funerals—rather mundane physical processes, from an unbothered inhuman or angelic view (in the sense that the heavens should apparently be rather unmoved by present world ‘miracles’ and ‘atrocities’ to not intervene), are elevated to some yet still, by supposed “rational beings,” strange mystical and ritualistic significance. The absence of myths is precisely the myth of the modern provençial subject, largely determined by social scripts, unable to express their lack of autonomy or their unfreedom by the illusion that they are exempt from the primal mythological impulse that generates mythos (narrativization) in the first place.

entry.title: new site incoming
entry.content:
hello bro, welcome to some garbage you were never meant to see. since we LARP aristocratic virtues, we can’t not own (virutal) property, being virtually a landed gentry (LARP, due to decreased standards of living, i.e., dying!) Only freaky serfs can chill exclusivlely on social media platforms (although, admittedly, this is hosted on github-pages right now, owned by microslop, so this site is part of their weird little AI-slop sourced digital fiefdom. Codeberg pages’s custom domain was seemingly too slow for a pre-release site, so we had to go with the more micro-sloppy solution.)

Anyways, all of this garbage will be gone soon once we switch up the means of deployment, so it doesn’t matter anyways (so wut up my n__, sorry i meant to type, my fellow noble, since u probably have the means to have ur own site m8.) Anyways, take back some means of digital production and become a petit bourgeoise class traitor woke reactionary, bro, maybe behind a patreon or substack if u must, it’s the only way.

All jokes aside it’s all very serious and we’re so back, you didn’t even know what u’re missing m8. Get ready for some digital tarrifs, paywalls, u pathetic nobody garbage person. u get limited access to whatever garbage natural intelligence slop plops on this feed by dubiously secure means (no worries, we’ll probably get an uncaptcha intelligence slop filter, where we make sure you’re not human, or more exactly inhuman.) Anyways, even more seriously: read, read, read.
entry.summary: hello bro, welcome to some garbage you were never meant to see. since we LARP aristocratic virtues, we can’t not own (virutal) property, being virtually a landed gentry (LARP, due to decreased standards of living, i.e., dying!) Only freaky serfs can chill exclusivlely on social media platforms (although, admittedly, this is hosted on github-pages right now, owned by microslop, so this site is part of their weird little AI-slop sourced digital fiefdom. Codeberg pages’s custom domain was seemingly too slow for a pre-release site, so we had to go with the more micro-sloppy solution.)
